query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as remaining_dup_groups FROM (
  SELECT messageId, sessionId 
  FROM messages 
  WHERE messageId IS NOT NULL 
  GROUP BY messageId, sessionId 
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) t;
